summary: PWA responsiveness testing for iPhones with notches and Dynamic Island. All features verified: viewport-fit=cover, safe area CSS variables, main-content-safe class with correct mobile/desktop padding, mobile header/bottom nav with safe area padding. All navigation tabs working.

css_safe_area_variables.test: CSS variables for safe areas defined in index.css

main_content_safe_mobile.test: main-content-safe class applies correct padding on mobile

main_content_safe_desktop.test: main-content-safe class applies normal padding on desktop (lg+)

mobile_bottom_nav_safe_area.test: Mobile bottom nav has paddingBottom: max(env(safe-area-inset-bottom), 8px)

mobile_header_visibility.test: Mobile header visible on mobile, hidden on desktop

mobile_bottom_nav_visibility.test: Mobile bottom nav visible on mobile, hidden on desktop

desktop_sidebar_visibility.test: Desktop sidebar visible on desktop, hidden on mobile

navigation_tabs.test: All navigation tabs work (Today, Habits, Achievements, Profile)

critical_code_review_comments: viewport-fit=cover correctly set in index.html meta tag
CSS safe area variables properly defined with fallbacks
main-content-safe class correctly calculates padding for mobile (header + safe area + spacing)
Desktop media query (min-width: 1024px) correctly overrides to normal padding
Mobile header uses env(safe-area-inset-top) for notch/Dynamic Island
Mobile bottom nav uses max(env(safe-area-inset-bottom), 8px) for home indicator with minimum fallback
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA responsiveness for iPhones with notches/Dynamic Island is fully implemented and working. Safe area CSS uses env() functions which evaluate to 0px in non-iOS contexts but will properly apply on actual iOS devices. Mobile viewport (393x852) shows correct padding (74px top, 88px bottom). Desktop viewport (1920x1080) shows normal padding (24px top, 32px bottom).

verified_features.viewport_fit_cover: Working - Set in index.html viewport meta tag
verified_features.safe_area_css_variables: Working - Defined in index.css with fallbacks
verified_features.navigation_tabs: Working - All tabs clickable and functional
